default_binding.ORG_NAME: the Maple County Storm Chasers Club
default_binding.OPENING_MOMENT: the day the big storm crosses the county
default_binding.DEADLINE_SIGN: a sky the color of dishwater
default_binding.TONE_MOTIF: weather is to be respected, never feared
default_binding.LEADER_CRED: the club leader and a retired weather-service forecaster
default_binding.ROUTE_B_SIDEKICK_CRED: a high schooler with radar on his laptop
default_binding.B12_PRIZE1: The Map and the Math Agree
default_binding.C22_PRIZE2: The Best Photo, the Lost Data

slots.meaning: The full proper name of the storm-response club running this story.
slots.guidance: A junior weather-response organization's full name; introduced once at the opening, a distinct proper noun.

slots.meaning: The county/region the storm crosses.
slots.guidance: A place name for the wider area at risk; used once as scene-setting.

slots.meaning: The street/road the club's headquarters sits on.
slots.guidance: A short road name; flavor detail for the opening line.

slots.meaning: The club's home base / meeting hall, returned to throughout the story.
slots.guidance: A single, welcoming home-base building; safe, never itself in danger.

slots.meaning: The specific entry point the hero hurries toward at the very start.
slots.guidance: A door or gate into the home base; always safe to reach.

slots.meaning: The recurring occasion that makes this whole story possible.
slots.guidance: A repeatable, non-lethal event/window (a scheduled duty day); should read as something that could happen again next season.

slots.meaning: The survivable time-pressure event that structures the whole day.
slots.guidance: A hazard to prepare for and shelter from, never a lethal threat; everyone in the story is trained to handle it safely.

slots.meaning: The visible sensory cue that the deadline event is approaching.
slots.guidance: A gradual, fair-warning visual cue (a changing sky); never itself dangerous, just a signal to get ready.

slots.meaning: The club's core safety-culture motto, stated once at the briefing.
slots.guidance: A short, reassuring one-line philosophy about respecting rather than fearing the hazard.

slots.meaning: The adult club leader who runs the briefing and mentors the MAPS team.
slots.guidance: A capable, calm adult authority figure; never a source of peril to the hero.

slots.meaning: The leader's credential/background, stated once at the briefing.
slots.guidance: A short professional background phrase establishing her expertise.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: A named location within the county, referenced by one or more teams.
slots.guidance: A short, concrete place name; safe to visit or merely mentioned in reports.

slots.meaning: The stranded hiker the RADIO team helps rescue.
slots.guidance: A named teenage hiker in a survivable, resolvable predicament (a washed-out trail); never actually endangered by anything worse than weather, and always found safe.

slots.meaning: A landmark on the hiker's route, used to plot a rescue bearing.
slots.guidance: A distinctive rock formation; safe to reference on a map.

slots.meaning: The shelter structure the hiker reaches at the end of the rescue.
slots.guidance: A lookout/shelter structure reachable on foot; a safe haven, never a place of confinement.

slots.meaning: The outside agency contacted to help complete the rescue.
slots.guidance: A nearby official post that can dispatch help; a benign, cooperative resource, never a place of confinement.

slots.meaning: The name of the first team the hero can join.
slots.guidance: A short team name naming its function (communications-flavored).

slots.meaning: Route A's post/workspace for the whole shift.
slots.guidance: An indoor communications post; safe, enclosed, distinct from the other two teams' posts.

slots.meaning: The post's window, used as a recurring sensory frame on the weather.
slots.guidance: A single window feature in the post; safe, just a viewpoint.

slots.meaning: The adult who directly supervises the RADIO team.
slots.guidance: A capable, calm adult mentor; never a source of peril to the hero.

slots.meaning: The RADIO mentor's credential, stated once at first meeting.
slots.guidance: A short professional background phrase.

slots.meaning: The name of the second team the hero can join.
slots.guidance: A short team name naming its function (tracking/plotting-flavored).

slots.meaning: Route B's post/workspace for the whole shift.
slots.guidance: An indoor plotting/tracking post; safe, enclosed, distinct from the other two teams' posts.

slots.meaning: The teenage assistant who works alongside the hero on the MAPS team.
slots.guidance: A peer-aged or slightly older helper, tech-minded; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The MAPS sidekick's short background, stated once at first meeting.
slots.guidance: A brief descriptive phrase about their tech/tracking skill.

slots.meaning: The name of the third team the hero can join.
slots.guidance: A short team name naming its function (field-instruments-flavored).

slots.meaning: Route C's mobile post: the vehicle the team rides and shelters in.
slots.guidance: A sturdy team vehicle; safe shelter, distinct from the other two teams' posts.

slots.meaning: The adult who drives and supervises the FIELD KIT team.
slots.guidance: A capable, calm adult mentor; never a source of peril to the hero.

slots.meaning: The FIELD KIT driver's short descriptive tag, stated once.
slots.guidance: A brief, warm personality/role descriptor.

slots.meaning: The second adult on the FIELD KIT team, who runs the instruments.
slots.guidance: A capable, calm adult mentor; never a source of peril to the hero.

slots.meaning: The instruments specialist's short descriptive tag, stated once.
slots.guidance: A brief, competence-forward personality descriptor.

slots.meaning: The road the gauge-run stops are along.
slots.guidance: A short rural road name.

slots.meaning: A neighboring property passed on the gauge run, used as a wind cue.
slots.guidance: A short place name; safe, just a landmark.

slots.meaning: The farm where the animal-safety subplot takes place.
slots.guidance: A working farm; safe, familiar, never itself hazardous.

slots.meaning: The farm's owner, who needs help securing animals before the storm.
slots.guidance: A capable adult who welcomes the team's help; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The one animal that goes missing and must be found before shelter.
slots.guidance: A named farm animal in a survivable predicament (tangled in brush); always found safe and unharmed.

slots.meaning: The elevated overlook where the FIELD KIT team sets up instruments.
slots.guidance: A safe, open high point with a clear escape route; never itself hazardous.

slots.meaning: A fixed structure at the overlook used for photo scale.
slots.guidance: A benign landmark structure; decorative/reference only.

slots.meaning: Ending: the tested antenna repair holds through the storm (success).
slots.guidance: Positive or bittersweet-but-safe outcome; names the ending title directly. Nobody is ever harmed in any ending; a setback costs data, time, or pride, never safety.

slots.meaning: Ending: the untested antenna repair fails mid-storm (setback).
slots.guidance: Positive or bittersweet-but-safe outcome; names the ending title directly. Nobody is ever harmed in any ending; a setback costs data, time, or pride, never safety.

slots.meaning: Ending: the boosted bypass line carries every report (success).
slots.guidance: Positive or bittersweet-but-safe outcome; names the ending title directly. Nobody is ever harmed in any ending; a setback costs data, time, or pride, never safety.

slots.meaning: Ending: the unboosted bypass line loses a distant report (setback).
slots.guidance: Positive or bittersweet-but-safe outcome; names the ending title directly. Nobody is ever harmed in any ending; a setback costs data, time, or pride, never safety.

slots.meaning: Ending: the hero relays the stranded hiker's position for a successful rescue (success).
